ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the issue was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, high) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this pull request addresses */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this pull request belongs to */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Actor who opened the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pull request was created */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pull request was merged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request (e.g., open, merged, closed) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor reviewing the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this comment is related to */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request this comment is related to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the project (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the actor's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this action pertains to */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request this action pertains to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, closed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this label is assigned to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_labels" (
  "pr_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request this label is assigned to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_labels_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., issues open) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this timestamp belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., issue_created, pr_merged) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timestamps_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project membership */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who is a member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "issue_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue-tag pair */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_tags" (
  "pr_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request-tag pair */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_tags_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
